title: Intensely Nutty Kenyan Cocoa Toast
description: A midnight-craving Kenyan dish featuring cocoa powder and toast, with a nutty and snappy flavor profile, made with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a small bowl, mix together the cocoa powder and almond butter until well combined.
Toast the bread slices until lightly browned.
Spread the cocoa-almond butter mixture evenly onto each toast slice.
Drizzle the honey over the cocoa mixture.
Sprinkle the chopped hazelnuts and sea salt over the top of each slice.
Place the toast slices on the preheated skillet or griddle and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the hazelnuts are fragrant and lightly toasted.
Remove the toast from the skillet and let cool for a minute or two before serving.
